data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for keeping credential facts discoverable while documents remain restricted.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of keeping credential facts discoverable while documents remain restricted, as stated in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms this requirement is satisfied or any checks related to the discoverability of credential facts. The absence of relevant evidence leads to an inconclusive status regarding the requirement's coverage.
gaps: No evidence of mechanisms ensuring credential facts remain discoverable while documents are restricted.
